summary: Customer Performance page and Jessi top bar testing complete. Backend: 12/12 tests PASSED. Frontend: All features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/tracking/customer-rankings/{user_id} correctly implements period filters (today, week, month, all) and scope filters (user, org, global)
SCORE_WEIGHTS dict in tracking.py assigns appropriate weights to different event types (review_submitted=5, vcard_saved=4, call_clicked=3, page_view=1)
Rankings are correctly sorted by weighted score (not just event_count)
Customer Performance page (customer-performance.tsx) has proper period/scope filter components with data-testid attributes
AI Follow-ups tile correctly moved from home.tsx to more.tsx under My Tools section
Customer Performance added to more.tsx under Insights section
Jessi top bar (JessieFloatingChat.tsx) correctly shows 'Have questions? Ask Jessi' at the top of every screen
Root layout (_layout.tsx) applies JESSI_BAR_HEIGHT (22px) paddingTop for logged-in users to avoid content overlap
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer Performance rankings page fully implemented. Backend aggregates contact_events by contact_id and calculates weighted scores using SCORE_WEIGHTS. Frontend customer-performance.tsx has period/scope filters and detail modal. Jessi top bar replaces floating bubble - shows on all authenticated screens. AI Follow-ups moved from Home to Menu > My Tools.
